shots.visual: 机场旅途出行：近景口播/问题特写
shots.copy: No hot water when you're out with baby?
shots.notes: Hook shot opening, airport or travel trip, sharp close-up of portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, metallic purple band with nurture wise branding, white studio product reference product hero on bedside table, separate baby bottle beside it, cinematic soft light, subtle push-in, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style. USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device. Mood: No hot water when you're out with baby?

shots.visual: 机场旅途出行：呈现痛点（外出没热水、找微波炉麻烦、温度忽高忽低、飞机上/车内难加热）
shots.copy: Hunting for a microwave on the road is never easy.
shots.notes: Airport lounge or travel bag flat lay, portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, metallic purple band with nurture wise branding, white studio product reference, baby bottle beside it, soft ambient light, slow push-in, no medical claim, USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device, 9:16 USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device

shots.visual: 机场旅途出行：奶倒入恒温杯加热，再倒出到奶瓶（便携可充电设计、妈咪包/杯架都能放、多档温控；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶，圆柱杯体）；用法：奶液倒入杯内加热保温，再倒出到奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、奶瓶插入杯口、奶瓶浸在杯中加热（不是奶瓶暖奶器））
shots.copy: USB-C rechargeable — warm milk wherever you travel.
